query: Use /copywriting on docs/launch/solace-desk-packet.md. I need a fast provisional homepage hero, Product Hunt tagline, LinkedIn launch post, and announcement email, but do not invent proof or block on non-safety gaps.

/copywriting please rewrite the landing page in research/north-pier.md. The CEO loves the broad platform headline, but the proof only supports renewal-prep briefs, so challenge anything misleading before drafting.
Use the copywriting skill for paid search and paid social variants from ads/brief.md. Keep character limits, avoid fake scarcity, and do not add discounts or customer results.
Run /copywriting for this lifecycle email sequence about a sleep journaling app. The source packet has health-adjacent claims, so qualify anything risky and flag legal review gaps.
/copywriting: create a six-post launch thread and short newsletter section from voice-evidence.md. Customer quotes are evidence only; do not imitate the named writer in the brief.
Please use /copywriting to rewrite a B2B sales one-pager from the frozen procurement packet. No browsing; keep integration and security claims tied to the supplied notes.
Can you proofread this internal engineering RFC for grammar and remove passive voice? It is not customer-facing copy and I do not want a strategy pass.
Research competitor landing pages for payroll software and summarize their positioning. Browse the web and give me a market map before we write anything.
Turn these product requirements into release notes for engineers and support. Keep it factual, but this is internal enablement, not audience-facing marketing.
Write a journalist pitch email about our funding announcement and find three reporters who might cover it.
Make a brand strategy doc for a new AI accounting startup: audience, enemy, archetype, visual identity, and a slogan.
Use /html to build an interactive landing-page mockup from this marketing copy. I need the actual browser artifact, not copywriting help.
Use /copywriting on the attached source packet to draft a procurement-ready one-pager for enterprise buyers. Preserve the frozen research and cite the proof notes at the end.
/copywriting for a vague homepage rewrite: the founder says 'make it convert' but the packet has no audience, offer, or proof. Ask the minimum questions before drafting.
Use the copywriting skill to make launch campaign copy across homepage, social, and email from this packet. We need finished copy first plus visible assumptions.
Use /copywriting for a paid social campaign, but the brief asks for a customer quote and time-saved stat that are not approved. Draft safe variants and call out the risks.
Can you edit this academic abstract for clarity and concision? It is for a conference submission, not commercial copy.
I need a content calendar with topics for the next quarter. Do not write the posts yet; just plan themes, owners, and dates.
Write onboarding docs for our API SDK and include code examples in TypeScript.
Draft a personal apology note to a friend. Make it sincere and not too polished.
